assets.name: Cold Room 01
assets.description: Main dairy and beverage storage room.

assets.name: Truck 01
assets.description: Refrigerated unit for northern Lima deliveries.

assets.name: Chifa Delivery Van
assets.description: Delivery van for the second organization.

maintenance-schedules.observations: Quarterly sensor calibration and cold room inspection.
Preventive review before weekly refrigerated route expansion.

technical-service-requests.issueDescription: Compressor temperature recovery is slower than expected after door openings.
Gateway reports intermittent sensor signal during seafood storage monitoring.
technical-service-requests.interventionNotes: Antenna connector reseated and device restarted.
technical-service-requests.resultNotes: Signal improved but functional verification failed after the final reading check.

technical-service-requests.issueDescription: Truck sensor battery drain reported during route monitoring.
technical-service-requests.interventionNotes: Battery module replaced and sensor mounting reviewed.
technical-service-requests.resultNotes: Functional test passed with stable readings during route simulation.

technical-service-requests.issueDescription: Routine technical review requested for restaurant cold room sensor housing.

incidents.closureEvidence: Temperatura regreso a ser 3 despues de mediahora

incidents.correctiveAction: Adjusted thermostat and moved sensitive products to backup storage.
incidents.closureEvidence: Temperature stayed at 3.9°C for 30 minutes after intervention.
